name: LiveGolf Studios at Muskegon Country Club
about: LiveGolf Studios at Muskegon Country Club is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring TrackMan 4 technology with access to over 200 golf courses, challenge games, and practice ranges. The facility offers five retractable simulator bays available for rent in 30-minute increments, with the option to order food and beverages from Lake Bluff Grille during play. Catering to various groups, it provides a year-round golf experience suitable for entertainment, practice, and special events. Pricing varies by day and time, with specials including weekday bundles, happy hours, family discounts, and senior days.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 technology with radar and camera tracking for accurate simulation
Wide variety of courses, games, and practice modes for all skill levels
Retractable bays that can be integrated into Muskegon Country Club events
On-site food and drinks from Lake Bluff Grille for a complete experience
Flexible pricing with multiple daily specials and discounts

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available from Lake Bluff Grille served directly to the simulator bay
Bar service with draft beer, specialty cocktails, wine, and other beverages available

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar and camera tracking system with AI-powered practice features

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are not mentioned, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full menu and bar service from Lake Bluff Grille.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with kid-friendly games, mini golf, bullseye challenges, and $5 discounts for children.
